title: Describe people with more nuance
subtitle: Talk about personality and current mood.
overview: Use estar for current state, mood, or condition.

items.es: Ana es muy organizada y trabajadora.
items.en: Ana is very organized and hard-working.

items.es: Hoy está cansada porque durmió poco.
items.en: Today she is tired because she slept little.

items.es: Mi amigo suele ser muy puntual.
items.en: My friend is usually very punctual.

items.es: El profesor parece serio, pero es amable.
items.en: The teacher seems serious, but he is kind.

items.es: Cuando está nervioso, habla muy rápido.
items.en: When he is nervous, he speaks very fast.
